text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
84 
GAP_DAYS_MOPP_1M 
LABEL: 
Gap Split Network Preferred Mail Order — Number of Days in One-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using 
mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
—
